metadata.description: Batch 23 of 50 — Oxford 3000 words 2201-2300; source-aligned sequence

words.definitionEn: careful study to discover facts; to study systematically
words.definitionTh: การวิจัย / วิจัย
words.example: The team conducted research on defect patterns.

words.definitionEn: a person who conducts research
an arrangement to keep a place or service for later use
to keep for future use; a supply kept back
words.definitionTh: สำรอง / เงินสำรอง

words.definitionEn: a person living in a particular place

words.definitionEn: to oppose or fight against something
to solve a problem or make a firm decision

words.definitionEn: a holiday place or something used as a final option
words.definitionTh: รีสอร์ต / ใช้เป็นทางออก

words.definitionEn: something useful that can be drawn upon
admiration or polite consideration; to admire

words.definitionEn: to answer or react

words.definitionEn: to relax; the remaining part

words.definitionEn: a place where meals are prepared and sold

words.definitionEn: the final effect or outcome
to keep or continue to have
to stop working permanently
words.example: He plans to retire next year.

words.definitionEn: no longer working after retirement

words.definitionEn: to go or give back; an act of going back

words.definitionEn: to make previously hidden information known

words.definitionEn: to change something to improve or correct it

words.definitionEn: a major and often sudden change in government or society

words.definitionEn: something given for achievement; to give such a thing

words.definitionEn: a regular pattern of sound or movement

words.definitionEn: a grain used as a staple food
words.example: Rice is stored in a dry area.

words.definitionEn: having a great deal of money; valuable in quality

words.definitionEn: to remove or free from something unwanted

words.definitionEn: to travel on a bicycle, horse, or vehicle; such a journey

words.definitionEn: correct or on the side opposite left

words.definitionEn: a circular band; to call by telephone

words.definitionEn: a large natural stream of water

words.definitionEn: a route for vehicles

words.definitionEn: a machine able to perform tasks automatically
hard natural material; a style of popular music

words.definitionEn: the function or part played by someone or something

words.definitionEn: to turn over and over; a cylindrical form

words.definitionEn: relating to love or an idealized feeling
the top covering of a building

words.definitionEn: the underground part of a plant or basic cause
a strong thick cord
words.example: Secure the load with a rope.

words.definitionEn: not smooth or only approximate

words.definitionEn: circular; surrounding; one stage in a series

words.definitionEn: a way from one place to another

words.definitionEn: connected with a king or queen

words.definitionEn: a flexible material or an eraser

words.definitionEn: waste material

a team sport played with an oval ball

words.definitionEn: unhappy
in an unhappy way

a cold dish of mixed vegetables or other foods
regular payment for professional work

words.definitionEn: fine grains of rock found on beaches

feeling that needs or expectations have been met
